author: yy
description: Render yearly calendar views with events marked and color-coded. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: YY Ahn
manifest.description: Render yearly calendar views with events marked and color-coded.
manifest.name: Year Glance

name: Year Glance

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's new in 0.1.2

**Responsive sizing** — the calendar now adapts to the width of the pane it lives in rather than the window. Fonts scale up in wide panes, the 3×4 grid steps down to 2 then 1 column as space shrinks, and it falls back to horizontal scrolling below a minimum readable size. (#1)

**Consistent category colors** — auto-assigned colors are now derived from the category name, so a category keeps the same color across every calendar and regardless of the order categories appear in.

**Selectable color palettes** — a new `palette` frontmatter option picks a built-in preset (`default`, `vivid`, `pastel`, `ocean`) or takes your own comma-separated hex list. The default palette was also rebalanced to more distinct, colorblind-checked hues. Explicit per-category colors (`@Trips [#ff6b6b]`) still take priority.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Year Glance v0.1.1

Patch release to fix linter issues for Obsidian community plugin submission.

### Fixes

- Removed unnecessary `async` from `onload`/`onunload` methods
- Removed `console.log` statements (not allowed in community plugins)
- Replaced `element.style.display` with CSS class toggling for better theming compatibility

No functional changes—the plugin works exactly the same as v0.1.0.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Year Glance v0.1.0

Initial release of the Year Glance plugin for Obsidian.

### Features

- **Yearly calendar view** - Render a full year at a glance using `year_glance` code blocks
- **Two layout options**
  - `3x4` - Traditional 3×4 month grid
  - `12-rows` - One month per row, days aligned by weekday
- **Two display styles**
  - `compact` - Minimal indicators with hover tooltips
  - `expanded` - Event text visible directly on calendar with spanning bars
- **Event categories** - Group events with `@CategoryName` syntax
- **Custom colors** - Assign colors per category with `@Category [#hexcolor]` or use auto-assigned palette
- **Date formats** - Single day (`20260715`) or date ranges (`20260601-20260608`)
- **Today indicator** - Diamond marker highlighting current date (configurable)
- **Week start** - Choose Sunday or Monday as first day of week

### Example

````markdown
```year_glance
---
year: 2026
layout: 12-rows
style: expanded
---

@Trips [#e63946]
- 20260601-20260608: Conference

@Deadlines [#457b9d]
- 20260731: Project milestone
```
````
